<!-- equimo.finetune:AttentionPool -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-attentionpool"></a>
## `AttentionPool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.AttentionPool(dim: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', eps: 'float' = 1e-12)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

> Single-query attention pooling over token features.

<!-- equimo.finetune:AttentionPoolingClassifierHead -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-attentionpoolingclassifierhead"></a>
## `AttentionPoolingClassifierHead`

```python
class equimo.finetune.AttentionPoolingClassifierHead(in_features: 'int', out_features: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', embed_dim: 'int' = 512, num_heads: 'int' = 8, dropout: 'float' = 0.0, bias: 'bool' = True)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

> FINO/DINOv3-style attention-pooling classifier head.
>
> The head consumes one example's token matrix ``[tokens, in_features]`` and
> returns raw logits ``[out_features]``. It projects tokens to ``embed_dim``,
> layer-normalizes them, pools them with one learned multi-head query over
> K/V-projected tokens, and applies a final linear classifier.

<!-- equimo.finetune:AttentionPoolingProbe -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-attentionpoolingprobe"></a>
## `AttentionPoolingProbe`

```python
class equimo.finetune.AttentionPoolingProbe(backbone: 'PyTree', head: 'AttentionPoolingClassifierHead', *, n_last_blocks: 'int | None' = None, prepend_cls_token: 'bool' = False, l2_normalize_cls: 'bool' = False)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

> Backbone plus a FINO-style attention-pooling classifier head.

<!-- equimo.finetune:CLSPatchMeanPool -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-clspatchmeanpool"></a>
## `CLSPatchMeanPool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.CLSPatchMeanPool(num_prefix_tokens: 'int' = 1, *, num_prompt_tokens: 'int' = 0)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

> Concatenate the CLS token with the mean over patch tokens.

<!-- equimo.finetune:CLSPool -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-clspool"></a>
## `CLSPool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.CLSPool(index: 'int' = 0)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

> Return the CLS/prefix token at ``index``.

<!-- equimo.finetune:ContrastiveProjectionHead -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-contrastiveprojectionhead"></a>
## `ContrastiveProjectionHead`

```python
class equimo.finetune.ContrastiveProjectionHead(in_features: 'int', out_features: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', hidden_dim: 'int | None' = None, num_layers: 'int' = 2, activation: 'ActivationName' = 'gelu', dropout: 'float' = 0.0, l2_normalize: 'bool' = True, eps: 'float' = 1e-12)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

> Projection head with optional L2 normalization.

<!-- equimo.finetune:CTCHead -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-ctchead"></a>
## `CTCHead`

```python
class equimo.finetune.CTCHead(in_features: 'int', vocab_size: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', blank_id: 'int' = 0, bias: 'bool' = True)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

> Frame-level CTC head that returns raw logits.

<!-- equimo.finetune:DenseFeatureAdapter -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-densefeatureadapter"></a>
## `DenseFeatureAdapter`

```python
class equimo.finetune.DenseFeatureAdapter(in_features: 'int', out_features: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', activation: 'ActivationName' = 'identity', dropout: 'float' = 0.0, bias: 'bool' = True, weight_init: 'str' = 'trunc_normal_0.02', bias_init: 'float' = 0.0)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

> Project dense or token features along the last axis.

<!-- equimo.finetune:extract_features -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-extract-features"></a>
## `extract_features`

```python
equimo.finetune.extract_features(model: 'PyTree', *args, pool: 'PoolName | eqx.Module | None' = 'auto', feature_spec: 'FeatureSpec | None' = None, observed_preprocessing_fingerprint: 'str | None' = None, key: 'jax.Array | None' = None, inference: 'bool | None' = True, **kwargs) -> 'Any'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

> Extract features through an explicit spec or the compatibility fallback.
>
> A supplied ``feature_spec`` controls endpoint traversal and tensor
> post-processing. Without one, the native/heuristic behavior is unchanged.

<!-- equimo.finetune:FeatureExtractor -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-featureextractor"></a>
## `FeatureExtractor`

```python
class equimo.finetune.FeatureExtractor(model: 'PyTree', *, pool: 'PoolName | eqx.Module | None' = 'auto', feature_spec: 'FeatureSpec | None' = None)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

> Wrap a backbone and return pooled features.

<!-- equimo.finetune:GeMPool -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-gempool"></a>
## `GeMPool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.GeMPool(p: 'float' = 3.0, axis: 'int' = 0, eps: 'float' = 1e-06)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

> Generalized mean pooling over a token/frame axis.

<!-- equimo.finetune:GlobalAveragePool -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-globalaveragepool"></a>
## `GlobalAveragePool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.GlobalAveragePool() -> None
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

> Mean-pool all non-channel axes of dense channel-first features.

## `IdentityHead`

```python
class equimo.finetune.IdentityHead() -> None
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

<a id="equimo-finetune-identitypool"></a>
## `IdentityPool`

```python
class equimo.finetune.IdentityPool() -> None
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.pooling`.

## `LastTokenPool`

class equimo.finetune.LastTokenPool() -> None
```

```

<a id="equimo-finetune-linearhead"></a>
## `LinearHead`

```python
class equimo.finetune.LinearHead(in_features: 'int', out_features: 'int', *, key: 'jax.Array', bias: 'bool' = True, weight_init: 'str' = 'trunc_normal_0.02', bias_init: 'float' = 0.0)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.heads`.

<!-- equimo.finetune:LinearProbe -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-linearprobe"></a>
## `LinearProbe`

```python
class equimo.finetune.LinearProbe(backbone: 'PyTree', head: 'eqx.Module', *, pool: 'PoolName | eqx.Module | None' = 'auto', feature_spec: 'FeatureSpec | None' = None)
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

<!-- equimo.finetune:make_attention_pool_input_from_forward_features -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-make-attention-pool-input-from-forward-features"></a>
## `make_attention_pool_input_from_forward_features`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_attention_pool_input_from_forward_features(features: 'dict[str, jax.Array | None]', *, prepend_cls_token: 'bool' = False, l2_normalize_cls: 'bool' = False, eps: 'float' = 1e-12) -> 'jax.Array'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

> Build attention-pool tokens from a normalized feature dictionary.

<!-- equimo.finetune:make_attention_pool_input_from_intermediates -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-make-attention-pool-input-from-intermediates"></a>
## `make_attention_pool_input_from_intermediates`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_attention_pool_input_from_intermediates(intermediates, n_last_blocks: 'int', *, norm: 'eqx.Module | None' = None, num_prefix_tokens: 'int' = 0, has_cls_token: 'bool' = False, prepend_cls_token: 'bool' = False, l2_normalize_cls: 'bool' = False, eps: 'float' = 1e-12) -> 'jax.Array'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

> Concatenate final intermediate token features along the feature axis.

<a id="equimo-finetune-make-attention-pool-probe"></a>
## `make_attention_pool_probe`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_attention_pool_probe(backbone: 'PyTree', *, in_features: 'int', out_features: 'int', key: 'jax.Array', n_last_blocks: 'int | None' = None, embed_dim: 'int' = 512, num_heads: 'int' = 8, dropout: 'float' = 0.0, bias: 'bool' = True, prepend_cls_token: 'bool' = False, l2_normalize_cls: 'bool' = False) -> 'AttentionPoolingProbe'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.

## `make_linear_probe`

```python

```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.feature_extraction`.
